1000621673.english: Commander. What are you talking about?

1000621674.english: While Harpyia looked at me with a puzzled expression, the Elven and Dark Elven were in the middle of bickering.
1000621674.korean: - 하르페이아가 의아하게 나를 바라보는 사이 엘븐과 다크엘븐은 한창 투닥거리고 있었다.

1000621675.english: Hey, are you going to keep backing out? This is a golden opportunity!
1000621675.korean: 야, 너 자꾸 뺄 거야? 절호의 기회라구!

1000621677.english: Okay, fine. We've had enough of forest bathing, so let's change clothes now.
1000621677.korean: 돼, 됐어. 삼림욕도 할만큼 했으니 이제 옷 갈아 입자.

1000621678.english: Already? I want to do more.

1000621683.english: Ah, I need to change my clothes too.

1000621684.english: I'll go change when those two come back... huh?
1000621684.korean: 저 둘이 돌아오면 갈아입으러 갔다올... 어?

1000621686.english: It’s a bit awkward if everyone else is wearing casual clothes and I’m the only one in a swimsuit.
1000621686.korean: 다 평상복인데 나만 수영복이면 좀 그렇잖아.

1000621687.english: ...You look at my swimsuit a lot when it's just the two of us resting after I win first place in a swimming competition. I'm confident- huh?
1000621687.korean: ...수영복은 나 수영대회 1등하고 단 둘이 쉴 때 많이 봐. 나, 자신있으- 어?

1000621688.english: - Following Harpyia's gaze, there was a bioroid I had never seen before.
1000621688.korean: - 하르페이아의 시선을 따라가자 처음 보는 바이오로이드가 있었다.

1000621690.english: I am Black Wyrm S9, a large-scale combat escort model of the Battlemaid.
1000621690.korean: 저는 블랙 웜 S9, 배틀메이드의 대단위 전투 호위 모델입니다.

1000621691.english: And, I am a member of the bioroid protection community living on this island.
1000621691.korean: 그리고, 이 섬에서 지내는 바이오로이드 보호 공동체의 일원입니다.

1000621692.english: Ah! I heard there are bioroids operating independently, besides Laviata's resistance...
1000621692.korean: 아! 라비아타의 저항군 말고 독립적으로 활동하는 바이오로이드들이 있다고 들었는데...

1000621693.english: Harpyia stood in front of me, blocking my path, saying that.
1000621693.korean: - 하르페이아는 그렇게 말하며 내 앞을 가로막고 섰다.

1000621695.english: We originally traveled around the world rescuing bioroids in danger.
1000621695.korean: 저희는 원래 세계 각지를 돌아다니며 위험에 처한 바이오로이드들을 구호했습니다.

1000621696.english: Then, as the number of people increased, the 'leader' decided that the safety of the members could no longer be guaranteed, so they moved their residence to this island.
1000621696.korean: 그러다 머릿수가 많아지고, 더이상 구성원들의 안전을 보장할 수 없을 것 같다는 '리더'의 판단에 이 섬으로 거처를 옮겼습니다.

1000621697.english: Black Wyrm bowed his head gracefully.

1000621698.english: How about you say hello to our leader?
1000621698.korean: 저희 리더와 인사를 나누시는 것이 어떠시겠습니까?

1000621699.english: I will guide you to the village.

1000621700.english: As if that weren't enough, the manpower shortage problem became even more pronounced after the invincible Dragon Fleet joined.
1000621700.korean: - 그렇지 않아도 무적의 용의 함대가 합류한 뒤 인원 부족 문제가 더욱 불거졌다.

1000621701.english: - In this situation, if an already organized group joins us rather than a small number of bioroids being rescued in the operation area, it will be of great help to us.
1000621701.korean: - 이런 상황에서 작전 지역에서 구조하는 소수의 바이오로이드가 아닌 이미 체계가 잡힌 단체가 합류하게 된다면 우리에게 큰 도움이 될 것이다.

1000621702.english: As if reading my mind, Black Wyrm opened his mouth.
1000621702.korean: - 내 생각을 읽기라도 한 듯 블랙 웜이 입을 열었다.

1000621703.english: We are bioroids. We cannot disobey the orders of humans.
1000621703.korean: 저희는 바이오로이드. 인간님의 명령을 거스를 수 없습니다.

1000621704.english: The leader will surely follow the will of the human being as well.
1000621704.korean: 리더께서도 분명히 인간님의 뜻을 따르실 것입니다.

1000621705.english: Just as the Black Wyrm bowed its head again and was about to take the lead, the bushes stirred.
1000621705.korean: - 블랙 웜이 다시 고개를 숙이고 앞장서려는 때에 풀숲이 움직였다.

1000621709.english: Oh, so they were kids who lived together? I've heard of kids like that.
1000621709.korean: 오, 자기들끼리 모여살던 애들이구나? 그런 애들도 있다고 들어본 적 있어.

1000621710.english: Let's go. This looks like fun.

1000621712.english: Is it okay if we go by ourselves? Shouldn't we invite companions?
1000621712.korean: 우리끼리 가도 괜찮아? 컴패니언 분들을 불러야하는 거 아냐?

1000621713.english: Black Wyrm spoke up before I could even answer.
1000621713.korean: - 내가 대답을 하기도 전에 블랙 웜이 말을 꺼냈다.

1000621714.english: I am part of the Battlemaid series, but I am a model specialized in protecting key personnel on the battlefield.
1000621714.korean: 저는 배틀메이드 시리즈이지만, 전장에서의 요인 보호에 특화된 모델입니다.

1000621715.english: I promise not to leave a single scratch on your... Commander.
1000621715.korean: 여러분의... 사령관님에게는 생채기 하나 만들지 않겠다고 약속드립니다.

1000621720.english: It's heaven, isn't it? Yeah, this is exactly what I wanted!
1000621720.korean: 천국이잖아? 그래, 바로 이런 걸 원했어!

1000621721.english: The village we arrived at, guided by the Black Wyrm, was literally like a village of fairies.
1000621721.korean: - 블랙 웜의 안내를 받아 도착한 마을은 말 그대로 요정들의 마을 같았다.

1000621722.english: Large trees wrap around the buildings, creating a mysterious atmosphere.
1000621722.korean: - 커다랗게 자라난 나무들이 건물들을 휘감아 신비로운 분위기를 자아낸다.

1000621723.english: It is our leader's preference. It also helps with hiding from the Iron Bug.
1000621723.korean: 저희 리더의 취향이십니다. 철충들에게서 몸을 숨기는데에도 도움이 되고요.

1000621727.english: He is the person who used to lead our Elven series.
1000621727.korean: 예전에 우리 엘븐 시리즈들을 이끌던 분이야.

1000621728.english: He is incredibly strong and charismatic.

1000621730.english: If you just reach out your hand, a tree grows, and if you wave your hand, vitality returns to our tired bodies.
1000621730.korean: 막 손을 뻗으면 나무가 자라나고, 손을 휘저으면 지쳤던 우리 몸에 생기가 돌아와.

1000621731.english: - Just by listening to the description, it sounds like you're using magic or something...?
1000621731.korean: - 말만 들어선 마법이라도 쓰는 것 같은데...?

1000621732.english: We're elves too, so it's only natural that he/she is an elf, isn't it?

1000621733.english: I apologize. The leader is currently away on other business, so I will inform you shortly.
1000621733.korean: 죄송합니다. 리더께선 잠시 다른 용무중이시라, 곧 안내해드리겠습니다.

1000621734.english: Then I'll go talk to the kids who live here.
1000621734.korean: 그럼 난 여기 사는 애들이랑 얘기좀 하고 올게.

1000621735.english: Oh, there are sisters too, you know? Hi~

1000621738.english: A familiar sense of anxiety overwhelms me.

1000621739.english: - Based on my experience meeting many high-ranking bioroids so far...
1000621739.korean: - 지금껏 높은 지위의 바이오로이드를 많이 만나본 경험상...

1000621742.english: Well, once you meet them, you'll know right away.
1000621742.korean: 이, 일단 만나보면 바로 알 수 있을거야.

1000621743.english: As soon as the Dark Elven finished speaking his ominous words, a loud noise was heard from inside the village.
1000621743.korean: - 다크엘븐의 불길한 말이 끝나자마자 마을 안쪽에서 큰 소리가 들렸다.

1000621748.english: Dark Elven held a shotgun and stuck close to my side, while Harpyia kept watch over the surroundings.
1000621748.korean: - 다크엘븐은 샷건을 들고 내 옆으로 붙고, 하르페이아는 주위를 경계했다.

1000621749.english: Some of the village bioroids who had been glancing at us hurriedly ran toward the source of the sound.
1000621749.korean: - 우리를 힐끔힐끔 보고 있던 마을의 바이오로이드들 중 일부가 급히 소리가 난 곳으로 달려갔다.

1000621753.english: I just took a look... and something doesn't seem right.
1000621753.korean: 좀 보고 왔는데... 아무래도 심상치 않은걸?

1000621757.english: Yeah. A kid wearing pure white clothes was being held captive by the kids here.
1000621757.korean: 응. 새하얀 옷을 입은 애가 여기 애들한테 붙잡혀 있었어.

1000621758.english: As expected... it seems that conflicts of opinion are inevitable wherever many people gather, whether humans or bioroids.
1000621758.korean: 역시... 사람이든 바이오로이드든 여럿이 모인 곳에선 의견 충돌이 발생할 수밖에 없는 모양이야.

1000621759.english: As Harpyia said, it is hard to believe that all bioroids will cooperate.
1000621759.korean: - 하르페이아의 말대로 바이오로이드라고 전부 협력할 것이라고는 생각하기 어렵다.

1000621760.english: Because humans didn't unconditionally cooperate with each other just because they were fellow humans.
1000621760.korean: - 인간 또한 같은 인간이라고 서로 무조건 협력하진 않았으니까.

1000621761.english: It's not an attack by Iron Bug, so I think it's okay to relax a little.
1000621761.korean: 철충의 공격은 아니니까 살짝 긴장 풀어도 괜찮을 것 같아.

1000621762.english: Anyway, you're pretty impressive. To think you've snagged the seat right next to him so quickly. At this rate, you're practically becoming one with the Commander?
1000621762.korean: 그나저나 제법인데? 그새 딱 옆자리를 꿰차다니. 그러다 아주 사령관이랑 한 몸이 되겠다?

1000621764.english: The Dark Elven blushed bright red but did not try to pull away.
1000621764.korean: - 다크엘븐은 새빨갛게 얼굴을 붉히면서도 떨어지려 하진 않았다.

1000621767.english: There are some people who hold slightly different views from us.
1000621767.korean: 저희와 다소, 뜻을 달리하는 분들이 계십니다.

1000621768.english: It was an attack by them.

1000621769.english: Black Wyrm continued speaking without any change in expression, as if it were no big deal.
1000621769.korean: - 블랙 웜은 별 일 아니라는듯 표정변화 없이 말을 이었다.

1000621770.english: This is the first time I've faced such a violent attack, but thanks to it, I was able to capture it.
1000621770.korean: 이런 과격한 공격은 처음입니다만, 덕분에 사로잡을 수 있었습니다.

1000621771.english: He is currently being held captive separately.

1000621772.english: At my words, Black Wyrm bowed his head deeply.
1000621772.korean: - 내 말에 블랙 웜은 깊숙히 고개를 숙였다.

1000621773.english: And now the leader has gone to handle the accident.
1000621773.korean: 그리고 지금 리더께선 사고를 수습하러 가셨습니다.

1000621774.english: I am very sorry, but could you please wait just a moment?

1000621775.english: - He glanced at the team members to ask for their opinions.
1000621775.korean: - 의견을 묻기 위해 대원들에게 슬쩍 눈길을 던졌다.

1000621776.english: If that is the case, it can't be helped. They say that person is so precious that even in the past, let alone us, hardly any humans met.
1000621776.korean: 그런거라면 어쩔 수 없지. 그분은 굉장히 귀하신 분이라 예전에도 우리는 커녕 인간들도 거의 못 만났대.

1000621777.english: The more I hear about that bioroid called the leader, the more my worries pile up...
1000621777.korean: - 그 리더라는 바이오로이드에 대해 들을 수록 점점 걱정이 쌓여만 간다...

1000621778.english: Then, would you like to take a brief look around the village? I will guide you.
1000621778.korean: 그럼 잠시 마을이라도 둘러보시겠습니까? 안내를 붙여드리겠습니다.

1000621779.english: Oh, never mind that. We'll take care of it.
1000621779.korean: 아, 그건 됐어. 우리가 알아서 할게.

1000621781.english: There are two Elven series here?

1000621782.english: I can tell what the village layout is like without even looking.
1000621782.korean: 마을 구조가 어떨지는 안 봐도 알아.

1000621784.english: ...Please be careful not to get lost.

1000621785.english: Well then, shall we go? Here, Commander.

1000621786.english: As soon as Black Wyrm left, Elven grinned and linked arms with me.
1000621786.korean: - 블랙 웜이 자리를 떠나자마자 엘븐은 싱글싱글 웃으며 내 팔짱을 꼈다.

1000621787.english: Let's take a look around first. It's probably going to get crowded the further inside you go, but it'll be fine as long as I'm with the Dark Elven.
1000621787.korean: 일단 한 바퀴 둘러보자. 아마 안쪽으로 들어갈수록 복잡할텐데, 나랑 다크엘븐이 있으면 괜찮아.

1000621790.english: At Elven's words, Dark Elven also cautiously crossed arms with my other arm.
1000621790.korean: - 엘븐의 말에 다크엘븐도 조심스럽게 내 반대편 팔짱을 꼈다.

1000621791.english: But there are quite a lot of residents?

1000621792.english: Just as Harpyia said, there seemed to be quite a number of residents looking at us with curious eyes.
1000621792.korean: - 하르페이아의 말대로 우리를 호기심어린 시선으로 바라보는 주민들의 숫자는 꽤 되어보였다.

1000621793.english: Plus, they come from a diverse range of companies, too.

1000621794.english: I think the bioroid relief organization is real.
1000621794.korean: 바이오로이드 구호 단체라는 건 진짜인 것 같아.

1000621795.english: Dark Elven. Let's stick closer and show them our love for the Commander~
1000621795.korean: 다크엘븐. 더 딱 붙어서 쟤네한테 사령관에 대한 우리의 사랑을 보여주자구~

1000621798.english: - I started looking around the village in a ridiculous state, with an Elven and a Dark Elven hanging on either side.
1000621798.korean: - 양 옆에 엘븐과 다크엘븐을 매단 우스꽝스러운 꼴로 마을을 둘러보기 시작했다.

1000621799.english: That "fairy village" was clearly just a nickname, but it wouldn't have been strange if real fairies actually lived there.
1000621799.korean: - 그 요정 마을이란 건 분명 별명 같은 거겠지만, 마을은 진짜 요정이 살고 있다고 해도 이상하지 않을 것 같았다.

1000621800.english: Our leader has a bit of unique taste... so they say he used to decorate the camps we were dispatched to for work like this.
1000621800.korean: 우리 리더는 취향이 좀 독특해서... 우리가 작업을 위해 파견나가는 캠프를 이렇게 꾸미곤 했었대.

1000621801.english: Still, it looks like this place just turned out this way because the building is covered in trees.
1000621801.korean: 그래도 여기는 그냥 건물이 나무에 뒤덮여서 이렇게 된 것 같은데?

1000621802.english: Just as Elven said, the walls of an artificial building were visible between the large tree trunks.
1000621802.korean: - 엘븐의 말대로 커다란 나무 줄기 사이로 인공적인 건물의 벽이 보였다.

1000621804.english: No, it's nothing special... just that all the residents were wearing the same earrings.
1000621804.korean: 아니, 별 건 아닌데... 주민들이 다들 같은 귀걸이를 하고 있길래.

1000621805.english: Certainly... is it like a token to identify the members?

1000621806.english: Nah, no way. Something with such a terrible design?
1000621806.korean: 에이, 설마. 저렇게 디자인 구린 게?

1000621807.english: I'd rather just wear an animal ear headband.
1000621807.korean: 그럴 바엔 동물 귀 머리띠나 하고 다니는 게 낫겠다.

1000621809.english: Well, that leader is unpredictable, after all... Oh, look.
1000621809.korean: 뭐, 그 리더는 종잡을 수 없는 사람이긴 하니까... 앗, 저기.

1000621810.english: At the spot Elven was pointing, a group of bioroids were walking out from between the trees.
1000621810.korean: - 엘븐이 가리키는 곳에서는 한 무리의 바이오로이드가 나무 사이에서 걸어 나오고 있었다.

1000621811.english: These are the kids who were running when the explosion sound came earlier.
1000621811.korean: 아까 폭발 소리가 났을 때 뛰어가던 애들이야.

1000621812.english: There was a path in the gap between the trees that was cleverly concealed but not easily visible.
1000621812.korean: - 잘 보이지는 않지만 교묘히 가려진 나무 틈에 길이 나 있었다.

1000621813.english: - The inside was gloomy, likely due to the dense trees.

1000621814.english: The bioroid that carried out that attack might be captured over there.
1000621814.korean: 저기에 그 공격을 한 바이오로이드가 잡혀있을지도 몰라.

1000621816.english: If you're worried about our commander, it can't be helped!
1000621816.korean: 우리 사령관이 신경쓰인다면 어쩔 수 없지!

1000621817.english: As we got closer to the approaching residents, Elven, who had been lightly crossing his arms, pressed his whole body against them.
1000621817.korean: - 다가오는 주민들과 가까워지자 가볍게 팔짱만 끼고 있던 엘븐이 온 몸을 밀착해왔다.

1000621818.english: Hehehe, Commander~ It looks a bit secluded over there, let's go over there. Huh?
1000621818.korean: 우후후, 사령관~ 저쪽이 조금 으슥한 것 같은데 저기로 가자. 응?

1000621819.english: Judging by the look on his face, it seems he wants me to play along.

1000621820.english: Saying that, he put his arm around Elven's waist.
1000621820.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 엘븐의 허리에 팔을 둘렀다.

1000621821.english: Hehe, as expected, the commander is way too proactive.

1000621823.english: Harpyia, realizing it was all an act, also clung to me.
1000621823.korean: - 연기라는 것을 눈치챈 하르페이아도 내게 엉겨붙었다.

1000621825.english: We must have been buried in the two of them for a while, when the villagers passed by us, and Elven and Harpyia reluctantly pulled away.
1000621825.korean: - 얼마나 둘에게 파묻혀 있었을까, 마을 주민들이 우리를 지나쳐가고 엘븐과 하르페이아는 아쉬운듯 몸을 뗐다.

1000621827.english: The elven, who had been acting coy while saying that, pulled away reluctantly as the villagers passed by us.
1000621827.korean: - 그렇게 말하면서 앙탈을 부리던 엘븐은 마을 주민들이 우리를 지나쳐가자 아쉬운 듯 몸을 뗐다.

1000621829.english: The residents here don't know the commander, so they won't think it's strange.
1000621829.korean: 여기 주민들은 사령관을 모르니까 이상하게 생각하진 않을 거야.

1000621830.english: They might actually try to avoid coming near...
1000621830.korean: 오히려 근처에 안 오려고 할 수도 있고...

1000621831.english: Hmm... then should I just do it for real?

1000621833.english: I glanced back and saw that the residents weren't paying any attention to us.
1000621833.korean: - 살짝 뒤를 돌아보니 주민들은 우리를 신경쓰고있지 않았다.

1000621835.english: I followed the elven clearing away the drooping branches into the dark forest.
1000621835.korean: - 늘어진 잔가지를 치워주는 엘븐을 따라 어두컴컴한 숲 속으로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000621839.english: Before we knew it, we had ventured deep into the forest—or should I call it a village?
1000621839.korean: - 우리는 어느새 마을... 이라고 해야할지, 숲의 깊은 곳까지 들어와 있었다.

1000621840.english: In the middle of a deep forest where sunlight streamed in, a pure white girl sat inside a prison hanging from a large tree trunk.
1000621840.korean: - 햇빛이 새어들어오는 깊은 숲 한 가운데, 커다란 나무 줄기에 매달린 감옥 안에 새하얀 소녀가 앉아있었다.

1000621842.english: The girl knelt and looked up at the sky, which was hidden from view by a tree.
1000621842.korean: - 소녀는 무릎을 꿇고 앉아 나무에 가려 보이지 않는 하늘을 올려다보고 있었다.

1000621843.english: Soon, a pair of empty eyes turned toward me.
1000621843.korean: - 곧 공허한 눈동자 한 쌍이 내게 향했다.

1000621844.english: After a few seconds of eye contact, the girl's eyes widened in surprise.
1000621844.korean: - 시선이 마주치길 몇 초, 소녀의 두 눈이 놀라움으로 커졌다.

1000621845.english: To think it's trapped in a place like that... How pitiful...

1000621847.english: The Dark Elven, looking around, tilted his head.

1000621848.english: No one is guarding it, right?

1000621849.english: If it can confine a bioroid, does that mean it's much sturdier than it looks?
1000621849.korean: 바이오로이드를 가둘 정도면 보기보다 엄청 튼튼하다던가?

1000621850.english: ...That's right. That's a confinement cage used at the Black River Research Institute.
1000621850.korean: ...맞아. 저건 블랙리버 연구소에서 사용하던 감금용 케이지야.

1000621852.english: Even while the team members were talking, the girl was quietly looking at me.
1000621852.korean: - 대원들이 이야기를 나누는 와중에도 소녀는 가만히 나를 바라보고 있었다.

1000621853.english: The tree hanging from the prison where the girl is confined is quite high.
1000621853.korean: - 소녀가 갇혀있는 감옥이 매달려있는 나무는 꽤나 높다.

1000621854.english: Going up directly itself won't be a problem, but it will take time.
1000621854.korean: - 직접 올라가는 것 자체는 문제 없겠지만 시간이 걸리겠지.

1000621855.english: Hahaha, just leave it to me.

1000621856.english: - Elven put his arm around my waist.

1000621860.english: The elven, who had embraced me and leaped up from the ground, used a few tree trunks as footholds to reach the prison in an instant.
1000621860.korean: - 나를 끌어안고 땅을 박차고 뛰어오른 엘븐은 나무 줄기 몇 개를 발판삼아 순식간에 감옥이 있는 곳까지 도착했다.

1000621863.english: The Dark Elven carefully wrapped his arm around my waist.
1000621863.korean: - 다크엘븐은 조심스레 내 허리에 팔을 감았다.

1000621865.english: You hold onto me too. It's dangerous if we fall.

1000621866.english: Swallowing my laughter, I also wrapped my arms around the Dark Elven's waist.
1000621866.korean: - 웃음을 속으로 삼키며 나도 다크엘븐의 허리에 팔을 감았다.

1000621868.english: Jumping up and grabbing a tree trunk with one hand, the Dark Elven used the momentum to traverse several branches and reach the place where the prison was located.
1000621868.korean: - 뛰어올라 한 손으로 나무 줄기를 붙잡은 다크엘븐은 반동을 이용해 몇 개의 줄기를 거쳐 감옥이 있는 곳까지 도착했다.

1000621870.english: Harpyia approached and put her arms around my back while facing me.
1000621870.korean: - 다가선 하르페이아는 마주본 상태에서 내 등 뒤로 팔을 둘렀다.

1000621872.english: Harpyia, smiling shyly with her face bright red and sticking out her tongue slightly, whispered in my ear.
1000621872.korean: - 새빨개진 얼굴로 혀를 살짝 내밀며 배시시 웃던 하르페이아가 내 귓가에 속삭였다.

1000621873.english: Something came up today so we aren't just the two of us... but let's make sure we're alone next time, okay?
1000621873.korean: 오늘은 이런일이 있어서 단 둘이 아니게 되버렸지만... 다음엔 꼭 둘이 있자?

1000621874.english: Before I could even answer, my body floated up. Not long after, my feet touched a sturdy tree trunk.
1000621874.korean: - 그 말에 대답하기도 전에 몸이 떠올랐다. 얼마 지나지않아 발이 단단한 나무 줄기에 닿았다.

1000621875.english: The girl just quietly watched me come up here.
1000621875.korean: - 소녀는 내가 여기까지 올라오는 것을 가만히 바라만 보고 있었다.

1000621876.english: Commander, then we'll keep an eye on the surroundings to see if any troublemakers are coming.
1000621876.korean: 사령관, 그럼 우린 방해꾼이 오는지 주위를 좀 감시하고 있을게.

1000621877.english: Call me right away if anything happens. I won't be coming far.
1000621877.korean: 혹시 무슨 일 있으면 바로 불러. 멀리 가진 않을거니까.

1000621879.english: He waved to the soldiers and plopped down on a thick tree trunk in front of the girl.
1000621879.korean: - 대원들에게 손을 흔들고 소녀의 앞, 굵은 나무 줄기에 털썩 앉았다.

1000621880.english: The girl was still staring at me silently with a complex expression.
1000621880.korean: - 소녀는 그때까지도 복잡한 표정으로 말없이 나를 바라만 보고 있었다.

1000621882.english: Mr. Human... you're right, aren't you?

1000621884.english: At my answer, a small gasp escaped the girl's lips.
1000621884.korean: - 내 대답에 소녀의 입에서 작은 탄성이 새어나왔다.

1000621885.english: The girl bit her lip, perhaps surprised herself, and made an emotionless face.
1000621885.korean: - 스스로도 놀랐는지 입술을 깨문 소녀가 무감정한 얼굴을 만들었다.

1000621886.english: ...Do you have any orders for me?

1000621887.english: As you can see, I am trapped, so I cannot do anything for you.
1000621887.korean: 보시다시피 저는 갇혀있어서 인간님에겐 아무것도 해드릴 수 없어요.

1000621890.english: When the topic of the explosion from a moment ago was brought up, the girl's eyes lost their focus.
1000621890.korean: - 조금 전의 폭발에 대한 이야기를 꺼내자 소녀의 눈이 갈 곳을 잃었다.

1000621892.english: feel sorry for the girl, but since it seems like an important matter, I decided to listen to her story, even if I had to force it.
1000621892.korean: - 소녀에겐 미안하지만, 중요한 사안인 것 같아 강제로라도 이야기를 듣기로 했다.

1000621894.english: The girl, whose expression had clouded over slightly, soon composed herself and opened her mouth.
1000621894.korean: - 표정이 조금 흐려졌던 소녀는 이내 마음을 다잡은듯 입을 열었다.

1000621896.english: The girl, who had hesitated for a moment at my words, soon opened her mouth.
1000621896.korean: - 내 말에 잠시 망설이던 소녀는 곧 입을 열었다.

1000621898.english: The leader here saved me a while ago, so I ended up living with them.
1000621898.korean: 예전에 이곳의 리더가 구해주셔서 함께 지내게 됐어요.

1000621900.english: Snow Feather answered as if squeezing it out.

1000621902.english: A Dark Elven, surveying the surroundings from atop a tree on the opposite side, sent a signal.
1000621902.korean: - 반대편 나무 위에서 주변을 살피던 다크엘븐이 신호를 보냈다.

1000621903.english: It seems the residents have returned. From the villagers' perspective, seeing someone secretly talking to a criminal wouldn't look good.
1000621903.korean: - 아무래도 주민들이 돌아온 모양이다. 마을 주민들 입장에서 범죄자와 몰래 이야기하고 있는 모습은 좋게 보이지 않겠지.

1000621904.english: Snow Feather nodded silently at my words.
1000621904.korean: - 내 말에 스노우 페더는 말없이 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000621905.english: Touching the prison door was an action I took without much thought. However, when I pulled the handle, the door opened with anticlimactic ease.
1000621905.korean: - 감옥 문에 손을 댄 것은 별 생각없이 한 행동이었다. 하지만 내가 손잡이를 당기자, 감옥 문은 맥빠지도록 쉽게 열렸다.

1000621907.english: After exchanging blank glances with Snow Feather for a while, I snapped back to reality at the sound of approaching villagers.
1000621907.korean: - 한동안 스노우 페더와 멍하니 시선을 나누다 다가오는 주민들의 말소리에 퍼뜩 정신을 차렸다.

1000621909.english: I'm going to run away. For me...

1000621910.english: There is something we can never give up.
1000621910.korean: 저희에겐 절대로 포기할 수 없는 일이 있어요.

1000621911.english: Leaving those words behind, Snow Feather jumped down from the tree. Soon, the hem of her white dress disappeared between the trees.
1000621911.korean: - 그 말을 남기고 스노우 페더는 나무 아래로 뛰어내렸다. 곧 하얀 옷자락이 나무 사이로 사라졌다.

1000621913.english: The Dark Elven, who was urgently sending signals with hand gestures, shouted softly.
1000621913.korean: - 다급하게 손짓발짓으로 신호를 보내던 다크엘븐이 작게 소리쳤다.

1000621914.english: Stepping on the tree trunks one by one, the three of them joined up in the gap between the tree trunks where they were hiding.
1000621914.korean: - 차례차례 나무 줄기를 밟으며 셋이 숨어있는 나무 줄기 틈으로 합류했다.

1000621915.english: Look at them. They're really flustered.

1000621916.english: Just as Elven said, the villagers looked at the empty prison, talked amongst themselves, and then hurriedly disappeared toward the village.
1000621916.korean: - 엘븐의 말대로 주민들은 텅 빈 감옥을 보고 이야기를 나누더니 다급히 마을 쪽으로 사라졌다.

1000621917.english: Commander, what are you going to do?

1000621918.english: At Harpyia's words, he looked in the direction Snow Feather had disappeared.
1000621918.korean: - 하르페이아의 말에 스노우 페더가 사라진 방향에 눈길을 주었다.

1000621920.english: Hmm... The forest is too dense, so I won't be able to fly properly...
1000621920.korean: 으음... 숲이 너무 울창해서 제대로 날지는 못하겠네...

1000621921.english: We'll open the way for you.

1000621923.english: I wonder how many traces it left behind~

1000621924.english: Be careful on your way, because Iron Bugs might appear!
1000621924.korean: 철충이 나올 수도 있으니까 긴장하면서 가!

1000621926.english: (At the same time, the fairy village)

1000621927.english: This is all I can do. Please...
1000621927.korean: 제가 할 수 있는 건 이정도 뿐. 부디...

1000621931.english: Yes. It seems you will have to wait a little longer to meet the human.
1000621931.korean: 네. 인간님을 만나시려면 조금 더 기다리셔야할 것 같습니다.

1000621934.english: Hmm... ah, I brewed some tea. Would you like a cup?
1000621934.korean: 음... 아, 차를 끓였는데 한 잔 할래요?

1000621935.english: Where did I put the tea leaves... Huh?

1000621938.english: ...Ah! How about a cup of tea?

1000621940.english: I will find it for you, Leader.

1000621942.english: The place where we stopped was an ordinary forest.
1000621942.korean: - 우리가 멈춰선 곳은 별 다를 것 없는 숲 속이었다.

1000621945.english: Snow Feather smiled silently and skillfully climbed up the large tree.
1000621945.korean: - 말없이 웃어보인 스노우 페더가 커다란 나무를 능숙하게 타고 올라갔다.

1000621946.english: Snow Feather stood near the top of the tree, in front of where several tree trunks overlapped, and glanced down at us. As soon as it took a step, it vanished right before our eyes.
1000621946.korean: - 나무 꼭대기 부근, 여러 나무 줄기가 겹쳐있는 곳 앞에 서서 우리를 살짝 내려다 본 스노우 페더가 걸음을 내딛자 그 모습은 그대로 눈 앞에서 사라졌다.

1000621948.english: Particle image...? No, it looks closer to a hologram.

1000621953.english: I also took steps, following behind the team members.
1000621953.korean: - 대원들의 뒤를 따라 나도 걸음을 옮겼다.

1000621954.english: The view before my eyes wavered for a moment, and in a fairly spacious area surrounded by stems and branches, I saw the figure of a bioroid hugging Snow Feather.
1000621954.korean: - 눈 앞이 잠시 일렁이고 줄기와 가지로 둘러싸인, 꽤 넑직한 공간에서 스노우 페더를 껴안고 있는 한 바이오로이드의 모습이 보였다.

1000621955.english: Wh-you're safe! How did you get back?

1000621959.english: He, he's a real human... Oh my god...

1000621960.english: ...Feather, did you tell them everything by any chance?

1000621962.english: Snow Feather shook its head and stared at me quietly.
1000621962.korean: - 고개를 저은 스노우 페더는 나를 가만히 바라보았다.

1000621966.english: We belong to the commander here—I mean, this guy. It has nothing to do with your work.
1000621966.korean: 우린 여기 사령관, 그러니까 이 인간님 소속이야. 너네 일하고는 관련 없어.

1000621968.english: Mr. Human, please sit here. You all please sit down too.

1000621969.english: Ah, I'm Acrobatic Sunny. Please feel free to call me Sunny.
1000621969.korean: 아, 저는 아크로바틱 써니에요. 편하게 써니라고 불러주세요.

1000621970.english: Sunny greeted while brushing off the leaves and dust from the tree trunk.
1000621970.korean: - 써니는 나무둥치의 나뭇잎과 먼지를 털어내며 인사했다.

1000621971.english: As I looked around, objects that felt lived-in caught my eye.
1000621971.korean: - 주위를 둘러보자 생활감이 느껴지는 물건들이 눈에 띄었다.

1000621972.english: - Traces of a fire, simple cooking utensils, a sunken earthen floor that looks like it was used as a makeshift bed...
1000621972.korean: - 불을 피운 흔적, 간단한 조리 도구, 침대 대용으로 쓰는 것 같은 움푹 파인 흙바닥...

1000621976.english: There were quite a lot of different types of items, but they were all one pair each.
1000621976.korean: - 물건들의 종류는 꽤 많았지만, 전부 한 쌍씩이었다.

1000621979.english: From the beginning, it was just the two of us, Feather and me.
1000621979.korean: 처음부터 페더랑 저랑 단 둘 뿐이었어요.

1000621980.english: Feder, by any chance, how much have you told them?

1000621981.english: ...I got caught by others just as I was about to start.

1000621982.english: Hmm... then it's going to be quite long...

1000621983.english: Mr. Human, will you be alright?

1000621985.english: Ah, I'll brew you a cup of tea before we start talking. You'll barely be able to finish it all.
1000621985.korean: 아, 이야기 시작하기 전에 차라도 한 잔 내릴게요. 아슬아슬하게 다 마실 수 있을 거예요.

1000621987.english: Ah, um... would you like a cup of tea? I don't have much, so I can only have a little bit, but...
1000621987.korean: 아, 그... 차라도 한 잔 하실래요? 얼마 없어서 조금씩밖에 못 마시긴 하겠지만...

1000621988.english: Soon, the scent of tea spread through the small space in the forest.
1000621988.korean: - 곧 숲 속의 작은 공간에 차 향기가 퍼졌다.

1000621989.english: The Elven and Dark Elven skillfully found the path Snow Feather had taken and cleared the way for Harpyia and me to move easily.
1000621989.korean: - 엘븐과 다크엘븐은 능숙하게 스노우 페더가 간 길을 찾아내고, 나와 하르페이아가 이동하기 쉽도록 길을 열어주었다.

1000621990.english: Thanks to that, it didn't take long to catch up to Snow Feather running through the dark forest.
1000621990.korean: - 덕분에 어두운 숲 속을 달리는 스노우 페더를 따라잡는데는 그리 오래 걸리지 않았다.

1000621993.english: Snow Feather, who had been silently watching me and the crew, finally opened her mouth.
1000621993.korean: - 말없이 나와 대원들을 바라보던 스노우 페더가 겨우 입을 열었다.

1000621994.english: ...I will guide you to our base. We will be able to talk safely there.
1000621994.korean: ...저희 거점으로 안내해드릴게요. 거기라면 안전하게 이야기를 나눌 수 있을거예요.

1000621996.english: Please leave after hearing the story. This is...

1000621997.english: Because it is something we have to do.

1000621998.english: I had no choice but to nod at those amber eyes filled with determination.
1000621998.korean: - 의지로 가득 찬 호박색 눈동자에 나는 고개를 끄덕일 수밖에 없었다.

1000622001.english: Snow Feather shook his head at my words that I was trying to get the villagers to join.
1000622001.korean: - 마을 주민들을 합류시키려고 한다는 내 말에 스노우 페더는 고개를 저었다.

1000622003.english: Commander! It's an Iron Bug reaction!

1000622005.english: By the time the tea in the cup, which was about half full, had cooled down, Snow Feather, who had been continuing the conversation, fell silent.
1000622005.korean: - 컵에 반 쯤 남은 차가 다 식었을 때쯤, 이야기를 이어가던 스노우 페더가 입을 다물었다.

1000622008.english: Ah... well, nothing special happened right away after that.
1000622008.korean: 아... 그, 그다음은 당장 특별한 일은 없었어요.

1000622009.english: You mentioned earlier that you stopped by the village, right? You settled down there...
1000622009.korean: 아까 거기, 마을에 들르셨다고 하셨죠? 거기에 터전을 잡고...

1000622010.english: Decorate the village according to the leader's taste, gather resources, and occasionally drive out surrounding Iron Bugs...
1000622010.korean: 리더 취향대로 마을을 꾸미고, 물자를 모으고, 가끔 주변 철충들을 몰아내기도 하고...

1000622013.english: Feder, you've been preparing so hard all this time.

1000622014.english: I succeeded too... We were originally planning to do it just the two of us, but since you returned safely, our power has doubled, right?
1000622014.korean: 나도 성공했고... 원래 둘이서 하려던 거였는데 너까지 무사히 돌아와서 전력이 1.5배나 됐잖아?

1000622015.english: Everything will be alright. Don't cry. Okay?
1000622015.korean: 다 잘 될거야. 울지 마. 응?

1000622017.english: As if Sunny's comforting words had an effect, Snow Feather soon lifted its head.
1000622017.korean: - 써니의 다독임이 효과가 있었는지 스노우 페더는 이내 고개를 들었다.

1000622020.english: Just as Snow Feather was about to open her mouth as if she had made up her mind, Elven interrupted.
1000622020.korean: - 스노우 페더가 결심한듯 입을 열려는 찰나, 엘븐이 끼어들었다.

1000622021.english: Ah, sorry for the timing. However, a more important issue has arisen concerning the safety of our commander.
1000622021.korean: 아, 중요한 순간에 미안. 그래도 그것보다 더 중요한 우리 사령관의 안위가 달린 문제가 생겨서.

1000622022.english: Yeah. I stepped out in the middle of the conversation to keep an eye on things, but it seems like they are gradually coming this way.
1000622022.korean: 응. 이야기 중간에 경계할 겸 나가있었는데, 점점 이쪽으로 오는 것 같아.

1000622023.english: Oh, you don't have to worry about that.

1000622024.english: This isn't a place you can normally walk into, and on top of that, it's perfectly hidden by my hologram projector-
1000622024.korean: 여기는 일반적으로 걸어들어올 수 있는 곳이 아닌데다가, 제 홀로그램 투영기로 완벽하게 숨겨져 있으-

1000622025.english: Before Sunny could even finish speaking, the entrance we had entered flickered with a crackling sound.
1000622025.korean: - 써니가 말을 끝마치기도 전에 우리가 들어온 입구가 지직거리는 소리와 함께 일렁였다.

1000622029.english: Elven, stay by the Commander's side. Harpyia and I will go out and fight.
1000622029.korean: 엘븐은 사령관 옆에 있어. 나랑 하르페이아가 나가서 싸울게.

1000622030.english: If you don't mind, could you help just one of us?
1000622030.korean: 혹시 괜찮으면 둘 중 한 명만 도와줄래?

1000622031.english: ...It's okay. Sunny and I will go out.

1000622033.english: Huh? Are you sure it'll be okay?

1000622034.english: Yes. You've already helped me once, so I can't be of any more trouble.
1000622034.korean: 네. 이미 한 번 도와주셨는데, 더이상 폐를 끼칠 수는 없어요.

1000622040.english: What's wrong... I've never had this happen before...

1000622043.english: Ugh... should I go see the old man?

1000622044.english: There is someone who helps with our activities.

1000622045.english: They provided these items and supplies, and also improved Sunny's hologram device.
1000622045.korean: 여기 이 물건들이랑 물자도 지원해주시고 써니의 홀로그램 장치도 개량해주셨어요.

1000622046.english: Just as I was about to ask about that man, an unexpected figure appeared.
1000622046.korean: - 그 아저씨에 대해 물어보려는 순간 뜻밖의 인물이 모습을 드러냈다.

1000622047.english: So it was the Master after all.

1000622048.english: While searching for supplies, I sensed my master's presence and followed him.
1000622048.korean: 물자를 탐색하던 도중에 주인님의 기척을 느껴 그것을 따라왔습니다.

1000622049.english: What are you doing in a place like this?
1000622049.korean: 이런 곳에서 뭘 하고 계신 겁니까?

1000622050.english: I briefly explained to Vanilla and KeumRan what had happened.
1000622050.korean: - 바닐라와 금란에게 그동안 있었던 일을 간략히 설명했다.

1000622051.english: Vanilla, having heard the story, frowned slightly and looked at Snow Feather and Sunny.
1000622051.korean: - 이야기를 들은 바닐라가 살짝 눈살을 찌푸리며 스노우 페더와 써니를 보았다.

1000622052.english: Are they external bioroids...? It seems they have their own reasons.
1000622052.korean: 외부 바이오로이드들입니까... 나름대로의 사정이 있는 것 같긴 하군요.

1000622053.english: Then, let's return to the harbor with these people for now.
1000622053.korean: 그러면 이분들과 함께 일단 항구로 돌아가시죠.

1000622054.english: This area is still an unsecured zone, and communication signal strength is poor, making it difficult to respond to unexpected situations.
1000622054.korean: 이곳은 아직 미확보 구역인데다가 통신 감도도 좋지 않아 돌발 상황에 대처하기 힘듭니다.

1000622057.english: Then it can't be helped. We also cannot keep you here indefinitely, Master.
1000622057.korean: 그럼 어쩔 수 없군요. 저희도 주인님을 이곳에 계속 계시게 할 수는 없습니다.

1000622059.english: ...I'm sorry. I put someone precious to you in danger.
1000622059.korean: ...죄송해요. 여러분의 소중한 분을 위험에 빠지게 했네요.

1000622060.english: Human, thank you just for letting me go. We'll handle the rest ourselves.
1000622060.korean: 인간님, 저를 풀어주신 것 만으로도 감사해요. 다음은 저희끼리 할게요.

1000622061.english: Human, thank you for releasing Feather.

1000622062.english: Well then... see you next time.

1000622063.english: Snow Feather and Sunny disappeared into the forest before anyone could catch them.
1000622063.korean: - 붙잡을 새도 없이 스노우 페더와 써니는 숲 속으로 사라졌다.

1000622064.english: Vanilla, who was looking around at the traces of battle remaining nearby, narrowed her eyes and looked at me.
1000622064.korean: - 주위에 남은 전투의 흔적들을 둘러보던 바닐라가 눈을 가늘게 뜨며 나를 바라봤다.

1000622066.english: It looks like the place where they were staying was that space up in the tree... Were they discovered by the Iron Bug?
1000622066.korean: 저분들이 머물던 곳은 나무 위의 저 공간인 것 같은데... 철충에게 발각된 건가요?

1000622067.english: In that case, it will be dangerous going forward as well...

1000622068.english: Geum-ran nodded upon hearing that Sunny's hologram device had malfunctioned and she had been discovered by the Iron Bug.
1000622068.korean: - 써니의 홀로그램 장치가 고장나서 철충에게 발각됐다는 말을 들은 금란이 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000622069.english: Oh, and in addition to that...

1000622071.english: The only being a bioroid would call "Mister" is...

1000622073.english: We also happened to encounter a very suspicious robot.
1000622073.korean: 마침 저희도 굉장히 수상한 로봇을 만났습니다.

1000622074.english: You detached the core and ran away while I took my eyes off you for a moment...
1000622074.korean: 잠깐 눈을 뗀 사이 코어만 분리해서 도망가버리셨죠...

1000622075.english: Haa... If only I could get caught again...

1000622076.english: Anyway, I heard an interesting story from that robot.
1000622076.korean: 어쨌든 그 로봇에게서 흥미로운 이야기를 들었습니다.

1000622077.english: I will report back when I get back, so I suggest you revise your plan to secure the island.
1000622077.korean: 돌아가서 보고드릴테니, 섬 확보 계획을 수정하시는 게 좋겠습니다.

1000622079.english: Huh? There are other people here too?

1000622080.english: Greetings. I see that Miss Harpyia is accompanying your master.
1000622080.korean: 안녕하십니까. 하르페이아 양이 주인님을 수행하고 계셨군요.

1000622083.english: If you have finished clearing the battlefield, please head back.

1000622084.english: We have come quite a long way, so we need to hurry to make it to dinner time.
1000622084.korean: 꽤 멀리까지 나왔으니 저녁 시간에 맞추려면 서둘러야 합니다.

1000622086.english: Are you going back? What about the meeting with the village leader?
1000622086.korean: 돌아가는거야? 마을 리더 만나기로 한 건 어쩌고?

1000622087.english: I ended up completely forgetting about it.

1000622088.english: They might be looking for us. It's been quite a while since we were out.
1000622088.korean: 우리를 찾고 있을지도 몰라. 자리 비운지 꽤 됐잖아.

1000622089.english: Saying that, he connected the communication to the port.

1000622090.english: There has been a bit of a problem with the communication recently.

1000622091.english: Yumi went to take care of it, so it should be fixed soon.
1000622091.korean: 유미 양이 손보러 갔으니 곧 고쳐지겠죠.

1000622092.english: Just in case, I switched to text instead of the usual ignition communication.
1000622092.korean: - 혹시나 하는 마음에 평소의 점화 통신이 아닌 텍스트로 전환해보았다.

1000622093.english: - Just as I was about to give up because there was no response even after going through a series of security processes, a response came.
1000622093.korean: - 일련의 보안 과정을 거친 뒤에도 응답이 없어 포기하려는 찰나 응답이 왔다.

1000622094.english: I am truly touched that you came up with such a method, Master...
1000622094.korean: 주인님께서 그런 방법을 생각해 내시다니... 정말 감동스럽습니다.

1000622096.english: - I conveyed the location and situation of the elf village and asked them to call in a unit operating nearby.
1000622096.korean: - 엘프 마을의 위치와 상황을 전달하고 근처에서 작전중인 부대를 하나 불러달라고 전달했다.

1000622097.english: - A reply came that all units currently in operation would prioritize securing the area around the Elf village, and that one battalion of the Steel Line would come to provide direct support.
1000622097.korean: - 곧 작전중인 모든 부대는 엘프 마을 주변부터 우선적으로 확보할 것이고, 스틸라인 1개 대대가 직접 지원을 올 거라는 회신이 왔다.

1000622099.english: Then we'll go ahead and make up an excuse.
1000622099.korean: 그럼 우리는 먼저 가서 둘러대고 있을게.

1000622100.english: You might end up getting tired if you get unnecessarily involved.

1000622101.english: See you in a little while~

1000622103.english: thought I could wrap things up and get some rest, but to think another problem would arise...
1000622103.korean: 대충 끝내고 좀 쉬나 했는데 또 문제가 생기다니...

1000622104.english: Things were going really well... but you deserted and your score dropped...
1000622104.korean: 한창 흥하고 있었는데... 탈주해서 점수 떨어졌잖아...

1000622106.english: Do you happen to know where the boss went?

1000622107.english: Commander? Before coming here, Fortune... Harpyia, Elven, Dark Elven, and who else...
1000622107.korean: 사령관님? 여기 오기전에 포츈 언니가 하르페이아랑 엘븐이랑 다크엘븐이랑 또 누구더라...

1000622108.english: Anyway, I heard they contacted me saying they went out with a few people.
1000622108.korean: 뭐 하여튼 몇 명이랑 같이 놀러갔다고 연락왔대요.

1000622109.english: Ugh, I'm so jealous... While I'm struggling with grease like this...
1000622109.korean: 으으, 부러워... 나는 이렇게 기름때랑 씨름하고 있는데...

1000622111.english: I should have just snatched it up when you stopped by here earlier...

1000622113.english: Ah, um... since I got a swimsuit from Audrey...

1000622114.english: Oho... In short, you mean you intend to try this and that?
1000622114.korean: 오호... 요컨대 이렇게 저렇게 해보겠다는 뜻?

1000622116.english: I just... want to play in the water at the beach with the boss.
1000622116.korean: 그냥... 사장님이랑 같이 해변에서 물놀이를 하고 싶어서요.

1000622117.english: Hmm, then we'll have to wait our turn. There are already so many people on the waiting list...
1000622117.korean: 흠, 그러면 순번을 기다려야할텐데요? 벌써 대기 인원이...

1000622118.english: Oh, excuse me for a moment, could you hold that for me?
1000622118.korean: 아, 잠깐 미안한데 그쪽 좀 잡아줄래요?

1000622121.english: I'm going to have to take this apart. Let's see...

1000622122.english: It seems like there's no problem— huh?!
1000622122.korean: 별 문제 없는 것 같은- 어?!

1000622128.english: I thought my life as a bioroid was coming to an end...

1000622131.english: The discipline in this unit is quite strict. It's part of my desperate struggle to avoid getting caught.
1000622131.korean: 이쪽 부대 군기가 좀 세거든요. 안걸리려는 발버둥의 일환이에요.

1000622132.english: Still, how did you end up in a place like this...

1000622133.english: Hey, wake up! You can't sleep in a place like this.
1000622133.korean: 저기요, 일어나세요! 이런데서 주무시면 안 되거든요?

1000622138.english: Come out quickly because it needs to be repaired.

1000622142.english: How did you get in there...?

1000622143.english: came in through the pipes from the inside. Since I'm small— *yawn*...
1000622143.korean: 안쪽에서 배관 타고 들어왔지. 난 몸집이 작으니- 하암...

1000622144.english: Still, I didn't realize it was this close to the outside of the submarine. I should go a little less in next time.
1000622144.korean: 그래도 이렇게 잠수함 외부에 가까운 줄은 몰랐네. 다음부터는 조금 덜 들어가야겠어.

1000622145.english: As a technician, I can't tolerate that!

1000622146.english: Do you even know how sensitive a submarine is?!
1000622146.korean: 잠수함이 얼마나 예민한 녀석인지 알기나 하는 거거든?!

1000622147.english: If something goes wrong while you're at it, it'll be a huge problem!
1000622147.korean: 그러다 무슨 문제라도 생기면 큰 일 나거든?!

1000622150.english: I don't do anything that could cause a problem. It doesn't come in while driving.
1000622150.korean: 문제 생길만한 짓은 안 한다고. 운행중에는 안 들어와.

1000622152.english: It’s just the right amount of warm when docked and there is residual heat remaining.
1000622152.korean: 정박해서 잔열이 남아있을때가 딱 좋게 따듯하니까.

1000622155.english: Did you ask everything you were curious about? Then I'm going back to sleep.
1000622155.korean: 궁금한 거 다 물어봤어? 그럼 난 다시 잔다.

1000622156.english: Ah, please put that back on when the repair is finished.
1000622156.korean: 아, 수리 끝나면 그거 다시 붙여줘.

1000622161.english: Lord Demon, you're strong, aren't you?

1000622162.english: Let's throw this burden into the sea together.
1000622162.korean: 저랑 같이 이 짐짝을 바다에 던져버리자구요.

1000622163.english: There is no need for that.

1000622164.english: was wondering where you went after doing a quick job, but look, you were here.
1000622164.korean: 요놈 이거 작업 대충 해놓고 어딜갔나 했더니 여기 있었군.

1000622167.english: Sleeping even though I'm here... You must be really tired.
1000622167.korean: 내가 왔는데도 자다니... 많이 피곤한 모양인걸?

1000622172.english: Oh, then that works out perfectly.

1000622173.english: I'm going to the beach to practice swimming now, so let's run there together.
1000622173.korean: 지금부터 수영 연습하러 해변에 갈 건데, 거기까지 나랑 같이 뛰어가자.

1000622175.english: The more tired you are, the more you should exercise.

1000622178.english: Uh, we might run into Iron Bugs on the way...

1000622179.english: Then we can just get support from nearby units and take care of it. That would be a decent workout.
1000622179.korean: 그럼 주변 부대 지원 받아서 해치우면 되지. 적당한 운동이 되겠어.

1000622181.english: As you just left... it felt like you were shouting with your eyes...
1000622181.korean: 방금 나가시면서... 눈으로 외치시는 것 같았어요...

1000622182.english: I... I think I heard the scream of the soul, too...
1000622182.korean: 저, 저도 영혼의 비명을 들은 것 같은데...

1000622183.english: My body is starting to loosen up. Let's see... have I run about 10km?
1000622183.korean: 이제 몸이 좀 풀리네. 어디보자... 10km정도 뛰었나?

1000622184.english: The distance was a bit short, but... it was nice having a fight with the Iron Bugs in the middle.
1000622184.korean: 거리는 좀 짧지만... 중간에 철충들이랑 한바탕해서 좋았군.

1000622188.english: Tsk tsk. No wonder your stamina is in such a state, all you do is stay cooped up all the time.
1000622188.korean: 쯧쯧. 허구헌날 짱박혀있기만 하니 체력이 그모양이지.

1000622189.english: Okay. From now on, I’ll make a special exception and include you in every morning workout.
1000622189.korean: 좋아. 너는 앞으로 특별히 아침운동할 때마다 끼워주마.

1000622192.english: Did you guys come to swim too?

1000622193.english: Hahaha, look at him passed out!

1000622194.english: Is it dead? I'm poking it but there's no reaction.

1000622195.english: I did some light jogging before swimming.
1000622195.korean: 수영하기 전에 가볍게 뜀걸음 좀 했지.

1000622196.english: That's right, warm-up exercises are important!

1000622197.english: Tethys, let's do some warm-up exercises too!

1000622198.english: By the way, isn't that young lady wearing a swimsuit?
1000622198.korean: 그런데 그쪽 아가씨는 수영복 안 입나?

1000622199.english: Well, it is an outfit suitable for the beach, though.

1000622200.english: I... I don't need that kind of thing.
1000622200.korean: 저, 저는 그런 거 필요 없거든요?

1000622201.english: Besides, if I wear something like that, it's obvious the Commander is going to fall head over heels for me, isn't it?
1000622201.korean: 그, 그리고 그런 걸 입으면 분명히 사령관이 저에게 홀딱 빠지실 게 뻔하잖아요?

1000622202.english: Because that would be a hassle.

1000622204.english: You went to see Audrey last time and cried because you got pushed back in the line—
1000622204.korean: 너 저번에 오드리님한테 찾아갔다가 순서 밀렸다고 울었-

1000622209.english: Heh, I have a rough guess...

1000622210.english: Then what are you going to do about the swimming competition?
1000622210.korean: 그러면 수영 대회는 어떻게 할 거야?

1000622211.english: If we don't practice, even we would be in danger, right?

1000622213.english: Oh, right! Neri, I'll coach you as you practice.
1000622213.korean: 아, 그래! 나는 네리 네가 연습하는 걸 옆에서 코치해줄게.

1000622214.english: Instead, if you come in first place and get a one-week date pass with the Commander, give me one day-
1000622214.korean: 그대신 네가 1등해서 사령관님이랑 1주일 데이트권 받으면, 나한테 하루-

1000622215.english: Oh wow, really? Thanks! If I win first place, I'll give Tethys half of the week.
1000622215.korean: 오옷, 진짜? 고마워! 1등하면 1주일 중에 절반은 테티스한테 줄게.

1000622216.english: Uh, then there's a little left...

1000622217.english: Ah! Should I share some with Undine too? The Vice-Captain said it's fine.
1000622217.korean: 아! 운디네한테도 나눠줄까? 부함장님은 괜찮다고 했으니까.

1000622220.english: Hehe, you have a good friend.

1000622222.english: Right? I happened to need someone to time it, so this worked out well.
1000622222.korean: 그치? 마침 시간을 재 줄 사람이 필요했는데 잘됐어.

1000622224.english: Then let's hurry up! They said the Armored Maidens are over there, so I think we can practice together there.
1000622224.korean: 그럼 얼른 가자! 저쪽에 아머드 메이든 애들 있다고 했으니까 거기서 같이 연습하면 될 것 같아.

1000622228.english: Then let's hurry! They said the Armored Maidens are over there—
1000622228.korean: 그럼 얼른 가자! 저쪽에 아머드 메이든 애들 있다고 했으니까-

1000622230.english: If you're going there, I'm not going!
1000622230.korean: 거기로 갈 거면 난 안 갈거야!

1000622231.english: Huh? You said you'd time me!

1000622232.english: Ah... did you perhaps fight with them?

1000622237.english: You said you didn't need a swimsuit?

1000622240.english: You know, do you know why Thetis is acting like this?

1000622242.english: Because every single one of those guys has incredible physiques.

1000622245.english: Where it goes in, it goes in, and where it comes out, it comes out LOT... something like that?
1000622245.korean: 들어갈 데는 들어가고, 나올 데는 엄~청 나오고... 뭐 그런거?

1000622247.english: Imagine that girl is among them.
1000622247.korean: 걔네들 사이에 저 아가씨가 있다고 생각해봐.

1000622248.english: On top of that, if the Commander were to see that...
1000622248.korean: 거기에 더해서 만약에 사령관님이 그걸 보기라도 한다면...

1000622250.english: What? You were caring about that?
1000622250.korean: 뭐야, 너 그런 걸 신경쓰고 있었어?

1000622251.english: It's okay, it's okay. The Commander won't dislike Tethys just because she lacks muscle.
1000622251.korean: 괜찮아, 괜찮아. 사령관은 테티스가 좀 근육이 없다고 해서 싫어하진 않을 거야.

1000622253.english: Haa... Never mind. There's no point in talking about that with you...
1000622253.korean: 하아... 됐어. 너랑 그런 얘기 해봤자...

1000622255.english: Haha. If you're that worried, let's go the other way. I have a spot in mind.
1000622255.korean: 하핫. 그렇게 신경쓰이면 그쪽 말고 반대편으로 가자. 내가 봐 둔 곳이 있거든.

1000622256.english: W-well... it's not like I'm worried, but since it's a nice place, maybe I should give it a try...
1000622256.korean: 무, 뭐어... 신경쓰이는 건 아니지만 좋은 곳이라니 한 번 가보는 것도...

1000622257.english: Let's hurry up and go this way or that way! Neri wants to swim right away!
1000622257.korean: 이쪽이든 저쪽이든 얼른 가자! 네리는 어서 헤엄치고 싶다구!

1000622261.english: Good. Playing dead was a success.

1000622262.english: Hahaha. Even if you are Impet, you can't find me when I'm determined to hide my presence.
1000622262.korean: 후후. 아무리 임펫 상사라고 해도 맘 먹고 기척을 숨기는 나를 찾아낼 순 없지.

1000622263.english: You need to have the rank of the Battalion Commander to deal with me-

1000622264.english: What, what is this? Am I mistaken?

1000622265.english: I'm seeing things because I'm not getting enough sleep.

1000622266.english: I need to find a new point quickly...

1000622267.english: These days, if a spot is even slightly good, it gets shared on the 'Secret Network'...
1000622267.korean: 요새는 조금만 좋은 스팟이면 다 '시크릿 네트워크'에 공유되어 버리니 원...

1000622268.english: Right. Thanks to that 'Secret Network,' I was able to find you.
1000622268.korean: 그래. 그 '시크릿 네트워크' 덕분에 너를 찾아낼 수 있었지.

1000622270.english: The Regimental Commander and Captain Marie wouldn't look at such things for the sake of face, but...
1000622270.korean: 연대장님이나 마리 대장님은 체면상 그런 걸 보진 않으시지만...

1000622271.english: Since I'm low rank, I can use all sorts of tricks, you know?
1000622271.korean: 나는 계급이 낮은 만큼 여러가지 수를 쓸 수 있거든?

1000622274.english: I never dreamed I’d hear a lowly sergeant talking about seniority right before my promotion to Master Sergeant...
1000622274.korean: 원사 진급을 앞두고 병장 나부랭이 한테 짬 운운하는 소리를 들을줄은 꿈에도 몰랐는데...

1000622277.english: Do dead bioroids talk these days? That’s a huge discovery that would make even the Doctor fall over in shock.
1000622277.korean: 요새는 죽은 바이오로이드가 말도 하나? 닥터도 놀라 자빠질만한 대발견이로군.

1000622279.english: Haha, just kidding. I wouldn't actually think I was going to kill you.
1000622279.korean: 하하, 농담이다. 내가 설마 너를 죽이기야 할려고.

1000622281.english: Still, since it seems like you want to die...
1000622281.korean: 그래도 네가 죽고 싶어하는 것 같으니...

1000622282.english: I'll make sure you can't speak like a dead bioroid.

1000622283.english: Well, shall we try swimming while singing a military song this time?
1000622283.korean: 어디, 이번엔 군가 부르면서 수영이라도 해볼까?

1000622285.english: So, how is it? Refreshing, right?

1000622287.english: Tsk tsk. To be that weak. This won't do.

1000622291.english: During the march, sing the military song!

1000622293.english: The military song is, the glory of the Steel Line!

1000622298.english: Start the military song, one, two, three, four!

1000622303.english: For now, the atmosphere doesn't seem strange.
1000622303.korean: 일단 분위기가 이상하진 않은 것 같아.

1000622304.english: Still, it will take a little longer for the commander to arrive...
1000622304.korean: 그래도 사령관이 도착하려면 조금 더 걸릴텐데...

1000622305.english: I just have to stall for time somehow.

1000622306.english: I'll just need to wander around and show my face to the kids here.
1000622306.korean: 적당히 여기 애들한테 얼굴만 비추면서 돌아다니면 될-

1000622308.english: Leader, you are ready. I will guide you right away.

1000622310.english: Sorry, sorry. I can't do it right now.

1000622312.english: Actually, I met up with some other kids a little while ago. But...
1000622312.korean: 사실 좀 전에 다른 애들이랑 만났거든. 그런데...

1000622313.english: You know what I mean. The Commander seems a bit... worked up.
1000622313.korean: 그거 있잖아. 사령관이 조금... 불끈불끈한 것 같아서.

1000622314.english: I'm going to... spend some personal time.
1000622314.korean: 약간... 개인적인 시간을 보내다 올 거야.

1000622317.english: It seems you are not joining us.

1000622318.english: We already finished up quickly and came back~

1000622320.english: Understood. There is no need to rush, so please tell them to enjoy themselves to the fullest.
1000622320.korean: 알겠습니다. 서두르지 않으셔도 괜찮으니, 부디 충분히 즐기시고 오시라고 전해주시기 바랍니다.

1000622321.english: I will stay at the leader's residence in the center of the village.
1000622321.korean: 저는 마을 중앙에 있는 리더의 거처에 있겠습니다.

1000622323.english: Pfft, if you're going to make an excuse, do you really have to use something like that?!
1000622323.korean: 피, 핑계를 대도 꼭 그런 걸로 대야겠어?!

1000622324.english: This is a miracle cure for bioroids, isn't it?

1000622325.english: What bioroid would rush the human when they say they are having a good time?
1000622325.korean: 인간님께서 좋은 시간을 보내고 계신다는데 재촉할 바이오로이드가 어딨겠어~

1000622327.english: Ah, ahaha... Anyway, I think I've bought myself some time with this.
1000622327.korean: 아, 아하하... 어쨌든 이걸로 시간을 좀 벌었을거야.

1000622328.english: The commander needs to arrive soon...

1000622329.english: We've bought time as originally intended... so what should we do now?
1000622329.korean: 당초 목적대로 시간은 벌었으니... 이제 뭐 하지?

1000622330.english: You can just wait quietly here.

1000622332.english: Oh, then, could you possibly show me around here? I couldn't look around properly earlier...
1000622332.korean: 아, 그럼 혹시 여기 안내해줄 수 있어? 아까는 제대로 둘러보질 못해서...

1000622333.english: Oh, really? There might be more to see than you think.
1000622333.korean: 오, 그럴까? 생각보다 볼 게 좀 있을거야.

1000622337.english: Looking inside, it's just an ordinary forest village...?
1000622337.korean: 들여다보니까 그냥 평범한 숲 속 마을이잖아...?

1000622338.english: I originally heard it was as beautiful as a fairy village from a fairy tale...
1000622338.korean: 원래는 진짜 동화속 요정 마을 처럼 아름답다고 들었는데...

1000622339.english: Well, I guess that’s because back then, aside from being harassed by humans, it was a good time to make a living.
1000622339.korean: 뭐, 그때는 인간님들한테 시달리는 걸 제외하면 먹고살긴 좋은 시절이었으니까 그랬나보지.

1000622340.english: Where would you get the resources to decorate like that when there are Iron Bugs roaming around outside right now?
1000622340.korean: 당장 밖에 철충이 돌아다니는데 그렇게 꾸밀 자원이 어딨겠어?

1000622341.english: I think that's right. Everyone is working super hard.
1000622341.korean: 그게 맞는 것 같아. 다들 엄청 바쁘게 일하고 있구.

1000622342.english: Since their situation is different from ours, I guess everyone will have to work hard to maintain this scale.
1000622342.korean: 우리랑은 상황이 다르니까 이정도 규모를 유지하려면 다들 열심히 해야겠지 뭐.

1000622345.english: Didn't you just hear a scream?

1000622346.english: Is the commander having a good time with those two nearby?
1000622346.korean: 사령관이 근처에서 그 둘이랑 즐거운 시간을 보내고 있는 건가?

1000622349.english: I heard it this time, too.

1000622353.english: Is that guy also their friend from earlier?

1000622354.english: That can't be it. Look at your ears.

1000622356.english: The resistance kids weren't wearing earrings earlier.
1000622356.korean: 아까 저항군 애들은 귀걸이를 안 하고 있었어.

1000622357.english: The reason they are being dragged away right now might be because they were caught wearing fake earrings, but Snow Feather clearly said earlier that there were only two members of the resistance...
1000622357.korean: 지금 끌려가는 이유가 가짜 귀걸이를 하고 있다가 들통나서 일수도 있지만, 아까 스노우 페더가 분명 저항군은 단 둘이라고 했으니까...

1000622358.english: Then am I being dragged away because I did something wrong?
1000622358.korean: 그러면 뭔가 잘못을 해서 끌려가는 건가?

1000622359.english: That prison, and this village is more brutal than I thought.
1000622359.korean: 그 감옥도 그렇고, 이 마을 생각보다 살벌한데?

1000622361.english: It's too desperate to simply say that. It looks like I'm going to shed tears of blood.
1000622361.korean: 단순히 그렇다기엔 너무 처절해. 피눈물이라도 흘릴 것 같잖아.

1000622363.english: I hope we don't have to fight this time...

1000622364.english: Ah, if only it weren't for the Iron Bugs...!

1000622365.english: Where on earth did it go?

1000622366.english: To think you're faster than us in the forest...

1000622367.english: They must have lived in the forest for at least decades, and they must be familiar with the terrain around here.
1000622367.korean: 쟤네는 못해도 수십 년은 숲 속에서 살았을 거고, 이 주변 지형에도 익숙할 테니까.

1000622368.english: They weren't calling themselves a fairy village for nothing.
1000622368.korean: 괜히 요정 마을이라고 자칭하는 게 아니었는걸.

1000622370.english: No, did you miss it? I'm sorry, because of me...

1000622371.english: No. Even if you had followed us properly, you would have missed us anyway.
1000622371.korean: 아냐. 네가 우리를 제대로 따라왔어도 어차피 놓쳤을 거야.

1000622372.english: The forest is so thick that I can't even run properly, let alone fly...
1000622372.korean: 숲이 너무 우거져서 날기는 커녕 제대로 뛰지도 못하겠어...

1000622373.english: What should I do now? There isn't much time left until I'm scheduled to meet the commander.
1000622373.korean: 이제 어쩌지? 사령관하고 만나기로 한 시간이 얼마 안 남았어.

1000622374.english: Haa... I guess I have to go back.

1000622375.english: Too bad, Elven. It looks like winning an award is out of the question now.
1000622375.korean: 엘븐, 안됐네. 상 받기는 물 건너간 것 같아.

1000622377.english: Pa, let's hurry back. We'll be late.

1000622380.english: W-Are you going back already? W-Wait a minute...!
1000622380.korean: 버, 벌써 돌아가는 거야? 자, 잠깐만...!

1000622382.english: Master, aren't you having a hard time?

1000622383.english: Moving through the forest does drain some stamina, but it isn't unbearable.
1000622383.korean: - 숲을 헤치고 이동하느라 체력 소모가 조금 있긴 하지만 못 버틸 정도는 아니다.

1000622384.english: Please let me know if you are having trouble. Since three of you have gone to stall for time, it should be fine to slow down a little.
1000622384.korean: 힘드시면 말씀해주시죠. 세 분이 시간을 끌러 가셨으니 조금 속도를 줄여도 괜찮을 겁니다.

1000622387.english: Hmph. You mean a weakling like you is going to carry us on your back and run?
1000622387.korean: 흥. 주인님 같은 약골이 저희를 업고 달리신다구요?

1000622388.english: My body was reinforced with Origin Dust, giving me specs that are embarrassing to call an ordinary human.
1000622388.korean: - 내 몸은 오리진 더스트로 강화되어 평범한 인간이라고 하기엔 민망한 수준의 스펙을 가지게 되었다.

1000622389.english: Of course, it cannot be compared to the members who belong to the physically strong group, but physical strength, muscle strength, and endurance are enhanced to the point where it is embarrassing to call them ordinary humans.
1000622389.korean: - 물론 신체 능력이 강한 축에 속하는 대원들에 비할 바는 아니지만, 체력, 근력, 지구력 등은 평범한 인간이라고 하기엔 민망할 정도로 강화되어 있다.

1000622390.english: Seeing you say that, it seems you still have plenty of time. I'll speed things up— Eek?!
1000622390.korean: 그런 말씀을 하시는 걸 보니 아직 여유가 있으신가 보군요. 속도를 더 올리겠- 꺅?!

1000622392.english: - He grabbed the waists of Geum-ran and Vanilla, who were running from both sides, and lifted them up.
1000622392.korean: - 양쪽에서 달리던 금란과 바닐라의 허리를 잡고 들어올렸다.

1000622393.english: It feels a bit heavy, but not to the point where it interferes with running.
1000622393.korean: - 살짝 무게감이 느껴지긴 하지만, 달리는데에 문제가 생길 수준은 아니다.

1000622394.english: W-what are you doing! Get me down right now!

1000622396.english: I hurriedly put down the struggling Vanilla and the twisting KeumRan.
1000622396.korean: - 발버둥치는 바닐라와 몸을 뒤트는 금란을 황급히 내려주었다.

1000622400.english: Running along while having such silly conversations and playing pranks, we arrived at the outskirts of the fairy village before we knew it.
1000622400.korean: - 그런 실없는 대화와 장난을 치며 달리다보니 어느새 요정 마을 외곽에 도착했다.

1000622401.english: - Elven, Dark Elven, and Harpyia arrived first and were waiting.
1000622401.korean: - 엘븐과 다크엘븐, 하르페이아는 먼저 도착해서 기다리고 있었다.

1000622403.english: That's fine. You made up a good excuse.

1000622404.english: Instead, I saw something a bit suspicious.

1000622405.english: You saw the commander earlier, right? Everyone is wearing the same earrings.
1000622405.korean: 아까 사령관도 봤지? 다들 똑같은 귀걸이를 하고 있는 거.

1000622406.english: I heard an explanation from the team members about what had happened.
1000622406.korean: - 대원들에게 그동안 무슨 일이 있었는지 설명을 들었다.

1000622407.english: One of the villagers was dragged away screaming, and he was missing an earring...
1000622407.korean: - 마을 주민 중 한 명이 비명을 지르며 끌려갔고, 그 사람은 귀걸이 한 쪽이 없었다라...

1000622408.english: So I tried chasing after him for a moment before the commander arrived, but I missed him.
1000622408.korean: 그래서 사령관이 오기 전에 잠깐 쫓아가 봤는데 놓쳐버렸어.

1000622409.english: I know the direction, so if I go with KeumRan, we might be able to find it.
1000622409.korean: 방향은 알고 있으니까, 금란하고 같이 가면 찾을 수 있을지도 몰라.

1000622410.english: Then, Commander, sit down and rest for a while.
1000622410.korean: 그럼 사령관은 앉아서 좀 쉬고 있어.

1000622411.english: I'm going to go see the Dark Elven who went to meet the reinforcements that were supposed to come.
1000622411.korean: 나는 오기로 한 지원부대 마중나간 다크엘븐한테 갔다올게.

1000622412.english: After waiting for some time for reinforcements, the Steel Line members who were supposed to arrive did not show up even though the scheduled time had passed.
1000622412.korean: - 지원 병력을 기다리기를 얼마간, 도착 예정 시간이 지났는데도 오기로 한 스틸라인 대원들은 나타나지 않는다.

1000622413.english: Could it be that I'm lost?

1000622414.english: Because the forest is so deep and the signal strength is poor.
1000622414.korean: 숲이 워낙 깊은데다 통신 감도도 안좋으니까.

1000622415.english: I tried operating the communicator again.

1000622417.english: I could pick up a weak signal earlier, but now it's completely dead.
1000622417.korean: 아까는 미약하게나마 신호가 잡히긴 하더니, 이제는 아예 먹통이군요.

1000622418.english: ...No. All I can hear is the sound of the forest and... the sound of the Elven and Dark Elven running through it.
1000622418.korean: ...아뇨. 들리는 건 숲의 소리와... 엘븐과 다크엘븐 님이 숲을 헤치고 달리는 소리 뿐입니다.

1000622419.english: It seems they are circling this area extensively to look for the Steel Line members.
1000622419.korean: 이 주변을 크게 돌면서 스틸라인 분들을 찾고 있는 중이신 것 같습니다.

1000622420.english: For now, let's wait for the Elven and Dark Elven who went out to meet us.

1000622421.english: If that still doesn't work, I'll go to the harbor.
1000622421.korean: 만약 그래도 안되면 내가 항구에 갔다올게.

1000622422.english: The trees are so dense that I'll have to get out of this forest first, but...
1000622422.korean: 나무가 워낙 빽빽해서 일단 이 숲을 벗어나야겠지만...

1000622423.english: slumped back down onto the floor and checked the communication records I had looked at over and over again.
1000622423.korean: - 다시 바닥에 털썩 주저앉아 몇 번이고 들여다본 통신 내역을 확인해 보았다.

1000622424.english: I definitely sent the coordinates correctly...

1000622426.english: I was looking for you because you didn't come even after I waited for a long time.
1000622426.korean: 한참을 기다려도 오시지 않기에 찾고 있었습니다.

1000622427.english: It seems that you, the noble one, have superior physical strength compared to ordinary humans.
1000622427.korean: 귀하신 분께선 보통의 인간님들보다 체력이 뛰어나신 모양입니다.

1000622428.english: I hope you still have the capacity to receive the leader's hospitality.
1000622428.korean: 아직 리더의 환대를 받으실 여력이 남아있으시면 좋겠습니다.

1000622429.english: I didn't expect to see such a high-end model in a place like this.
1000622429.korean: 이런데서 이런 고급 모델을 볼 줄은 몰랐네요.

1000622430.english: Vanilla and KeumRan... I see that the two of you are accompanying this human.
1000622430.korean: 바닐라와 금란... 두 분께서 이 인간님을 수행하시는 거군요.

1000622432.english: Black Wyrm nodded as if he had come to terms with something on his own.
1000622432.korean: - 블랙 웜은 무언가 혼자 납득한 듯 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000622433.english: ...In that case, I understand why it took this long.
1000622433.korean: ...그렇다면 이렇게 오랜 시간이 걸린 것도 이해가 됩니다.

1000622434.english: What on earth have you been saying since just a moment ago?
1000622434.korean: 조금 전부터 대체 무슨 말을 하시는 겁니까?

1000622435.english: That is correct. I will guide you right away.

1000622437.english: Vanilla grabbed my arm as I tried to follow the Black Wyrm.
1000622437.korean: - 바닐라가 블랙 웜을 따라가려는 내 팔을 붙잡았다.

1000622438.english: It seems like the opposite has happened.

1000622440.english: Just as you call the Master, the Master is human and a noble being.
1000622440.korean: 당신이 주인님을 부르는 것처럼, 주인님께선 인간이며 고귀한 분입니다.

1000622441.english: Why does someone like that have to go in person to meet the leader of a small group?
1000622441.korean: 어째서 그런 분께서 조그마한 집단의 리더를 만나러 직접 가야합니까?

1000622442.english: We will wait here, so please go and bring that person called the leader.
1000622442.korean: 저희는 이곳에서 기다리고 있을테니, 가서 그 리더라는 사람을 데려오시죠.

1000622443.english: No one, including me, could speak at Vanilla's powerful appearance.
1000622443.korean: - 바닐라의 박력있는 모습에 나를 포함해 아무도 입을 열지 못했다.

1000622444.english: Even in the midst of this, Black Wyrm bowed his head politely to me without any change in expression.
1000622444.korean: - 그러는 와중에도 블랙 웜은 표정 변화 없이 내게 공손히 고개를 숙였다.

1000622446.english: It has been a long time since I received orders from the Human... and shamefully, it seems my sense of duty has weakened.
1000622446.korean: 인간님의 명령을 받지 않은지 오래되어... 부끄럽게도 사명감이 약해진 모양입니다.

1000622447.english: Then whose orders are you following?
1000622447.korean: 그럼 당신은 누구의 명령을 따르는 겁니까?

1000622448.english: You, the Black Wyrm model, are likely the one who values orders and mission the most among the Battlemaids.
1000622448.korean: 배틀메이드 중에 가장 명령과 사명을 중시하는 것이 당신 블랙 웜 모델일 텐데요.

1000622450.english: After the destruction of humanity, I am following the leader's instructions.
1000622450.korean: 인간님들이 멸망하신 후, 저는 리더의 지시를 따르고 있습니다.

1000622451.english: Strictly speaking, that person is my superior.
1000622451.korean: 굳이 따지자면, 그 분께서 제 명령권자입니다.

1000622452.english: ...until the Noble One issues another order.

1000622453.english: After saying that, Black Wyrm stared at me quietly with his red eyes.
1000622453.korean: - 거기까지 말하고 블랙 웜은 붉은 눈동자로 나를 가만히 바라보았다.

1000622457.english: Sister, why are you so angry...?
1000622457.korean: 언니, 왜 그렇게 화가 나신 건가요...?

1000622459.english: I merely taught the bioroid, who was unaware of the subject, the proper etiquette to treat its master.
1000622459.korean: 주제를 모르는 바이오로이드에게 주인님을 대하는 예의를 알려줬을 뿐입니다.

1000622462.english: We appreciate your love for our bioroids, but you must firmly establish your dignity where it is due.
1000622462.korean: 저희 바이오로이드들을 사랑해 주시는 건 감사하지만, 위엄을 세우실 곳에서는 확실히 세우셔야 합니다.

1000622463.english: Especially for newly reproduced or joined external bioroids.
1000622463.korean: 특히 갓 재생산되거나 합류한 외부 바이오로이드들에게는요.

1000622464.english: I like the commander better right now...

1000622465.english: Um, I also... my current master...

1000622466.english: also do not mean to say that I dislike you, Master. Please do not misunderstand.
1000622466.korean: 저 또한 주, 주인님이 싫다는 뜻은 아닙니다. 오해하지 말아주세요.

1000622467.english: It meant that you should definitely and firmly deal with ill-mannered bioroids.
1000622467.korean: 그냥 버릇없이 구는 바이오로이드에게는 확실히, 강단 있게 대하시라는 뜻이었습니다.

1000622468.english: Ah, it's fine as long as you understood.

1000622471.english: Captain May is probably the only member who speaks as harshly to the Commander as Vanilla does.
1000622471.korean: 아마 바닐라만큼 사령관한테 심하게 말하는 대원은 메이 대장님 정도밖에 없을걸?

1000622472.english: Vanilla began to visibly get agitated by Harpyia's agreement.
1000622472.korean: - 하르페이아에 맞장구에 바닐라는 눈에 띄게 동요하기 시작했다.

1000622473.english: I, I was originally designed with this kind of personality, and...
1000622473.korean: 저, 저는 원래부터 이런 성격으로 설계 되었고, 그...

1000622475.english: I didn't mean to blame her, but it seems Vanilla took it a little differently.
1000622475.korean: - 탓하려는 것은 아니었는데 바닐라는 조금 다르게 받아들인 모양이다.

1000622476.english: Vanilla finally regained her composure at my words, "I know very well that Vanilla worries about me more than anyone else."
1000622476.korean: - 바닐라가 누구보다 내 걱정을 많이 하는 건 잘 아니까, 라는 내 말에 바닐라는 겨우 안정을 되찾았다.

1000622478.english: Vanilla sat cautiously next to me.

1000622480.english: You sent the coordinates correctly, right?
1000622480.korean: 당신, 좌표 제대로 보낸 거 맞지?

1000622481.english: Then why on earth aren't you coming...
1000622481.korean: 그럼 대체 왜 안 오는 거야...

1000622482.english: The other kids aren't even in sight.

1000622483.english: Instead, I found only a group of Iron Bugs.

1000622484.english: It's not that far, but since we're going into the fairy village anyway, I don't think we really need to deal with it.
1000622484.korean: 거리는 그리 멀지 않은데, 어차피 우린 요정 마을로 들어갈테니까 굳이 처리할 필요는 없을 것 같아.

1000622485.english: The kids here will figure it out on their own.

1000622486.english: I guess I'll have to take care of this.

1000622488.english: Elven shrugged his shoulders when told that he had arranged to meet the leader here.
1000622488.korean: - 이곳에서 리더를 만나기로 했다는 말을 해주자 엘븐은 어깨를 으쓱했다.

1000622489.english: It feels like I've been doing nothing but looking for and fighting Iron Bugs all day today...
1000622489.korean: 나는 오늘 하루종일 철충 찾고, 싸우기만 하는 것 같네...

1000622491.english: The grumbling Elven suddenly pulled the Dark Elven's arm.
1000622491.korean: - 투덜대던 엘븐이 갑자기 다크엘븐의 팔을 끌어당겼다.

1000622494.english: - Elven dragged the two of them with both hands and approached me.
1000622494.korean: - 엘븐은 양손으로 둘을 끌고 내 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000622495.english: Commander. We've been running around in the forest and fighting Iron Bugs all day today...
1000622495.korean: 사령관. 우리 오늘 하루종일 숲 속을 뛰어다니고, 철충이랑 싸우고 했는데...

1000622496.english: It was really helpful, wasn't it?

1000622498.english: Elven brought his face close to me, right before our lips touched.
1000622498.korean: - 엘븐은 입술이 닿기 직전까지 내게 얼굴을 가까이했다.

1000622499.english: You're giving me a prize, right?

1000622500.english: Kyaa~ As expected of the Commander!

1000622501.english: In the end... I couldn't get away from 4...

1000622503.english: Of course! We've been together all day long, haven't we?

1000622504.english: Alright, let's go~ This must be the last battle of the day, right?
1000622504.korean: 자, 가자~ 이게 오늘 마지막 전투겠지?

1000622505.english: Ah, whyyy~ After all this hard work!

1000622506.english: ...I guess I should say it's a relief...

1000622507.english: I just need a date with just the two of us...
1000622507.korean: 나는 그냥 단 둘이 데이트하는 정도면 되는데...

1000622508.english: Sigh, I guess it can't be helped. I have no choice but to work harder to change the Commander's mind.
1000622508.korean: 하아, 어쩔 수 없지. 사령관의 마음을 돌려놓으려면 더 열심히 하는 수밖에.

1000622510.english: What, are you feeling embarrassed now?

1000622511.english: ...In the end, you're going to do it excitedly anyway.

1000622512.english: Ah, the Iron Bug signal is getting closer.

1000622513.english: I guess being shy can't be helped.
1000622513.korean: 부끄럼타는 건 어쩔 수 없지 뭐~

1000622514.english: Let's go. Commander, you can calm down in the meantime.
1000622514.korean: 어서 가자~ 사령관은 그동안 마음 좀 가라앉히고 있어.

1000622517.english: Do you two have enough ammunition?

1000622518.english: I've been using it sparingly, so I'm still fine. What about the Dark Elven?

1000622519.english: I still have some left, too. If necessary, I can just fight alongside him.
1000622519.korean: 나도 아직 남았어. 뭣하면 얘랑 같이 싸우면 되기도 하고.

1000622520.english: That is fortunate. I must hurry back once you meet that leader, Master.
1000622520.korean: 다행이군요. 주인님께서 그 리더를 만나보시고 나면 서둘러 돌아가야겠습니다.

1000622521.english: I won't be able to make it on time for dinner... I'm going to get scolded by Sowan...
1000622521.korean: 저녁 시간은 못 맞추겠네... 소완님한테 혼나겠어...

1000622522.english: Wouldn't the commander explain it well?

1000622524.english: Let's go back to where the master is.

1000622529.english: Geum-ran is asleep, leaning on my shoulder and breathing evenly.
1000622529.korean: - 금란은 내 어깨에 기대어 고른 숨소리를 내며 잠들어 있다.

1000622530.english: I was just planning to take a light walk, but instead I'm being harassed by some perverted robot...
1000622530.korean: 원래 가볍게 산책이나 하려던 차에 웬 변태 로봇에 시달리지 않나...

1000622531.english: It’s my first time escorting my master from the outside, and the battle just keeps going on...
1000622531.korean: 처음으로 외부에서 주인님을 호위하게 됐는데 전투가 계속 이어지질 않나...

1000622532.english: It was understandable that it was difficult.

1000622533.english: That's right. I could see that they were nervous the whole time.
1000622533.korean: 맞아. 계속 긴장하고 있는 게 눈에 보였어.

1000622534.english: Yeah. Just now, he was on edge the whole time, but as soon as the commander told him to rest after the battle ended, he fell asleep right away.
1000622534.korean: 그래. 방금도 계속 신경 곤두세우고 있다가 전투 끝나고 나서 사령관이 좀 쉬라고 하니까 바로 잠들더라구.

1000622535.english: The team members spoke in hushed whispers, but Geum-ran, who had keen senses, slowly lifted her head from where she had been leaning.
1000622535.korean: - 대원들은 소곤소곤 작게 말했지만 감각이 예민한 금란은 천천히 기댔던 고개를 들었다.

1000622536.english: Oh, sorry. Did I wake you up?

1000622537.english: No. It’s fine because I’m used to your voices.

1000622538.english: As Geum-ran got up and stood next to me, a Black Wyrm appeared.
1000622538.korean: - 금란이 몸을 일으켜 내 옆에 서는 것과 동시에 블랙 웜이 나타났다.

1000622539.english: I apologize for making you wait.

1000622541.english: The Black Wyrm bowed its head and stepped aside.
1000622541.korean: - 블랙 웜은 고개를 숙이고 옆으로 비켜섰다.

1000622542.english: A bioroid with flowing platinum blonde hair walked toward me.
1000622542.korean: - 백금발을 찰랑이는 바이오로이드가 내 앞으로 걸어왔다.

1000622544.english: I've been waiting for someone like you.

1000622545.english: < Aria of the Fairy Village > Continued in Part 2.

1000622547.english: The forest is so dense that it is difficult to move.

1000622549.english: Have you still not been able to reach your master...?

1000622550.english: The communication signal is very poor.

1000622551.english: No matter how dense the forest is...

1000622553.english: Sister, there is something I want to tell you about that...
1000622553.korean: 언니, 그것에 관해 말씀드리고 싶은 것이...

1000622556.english: It must be just an ordinary tree, but somehow I feel like I'm being watched.
1000622556.korean: 분명 평범한 나무일텐데, 어쩐지 시선이 느껴지는 것 같아요.

1000622558.english: I don't know if I should call it a gaze... but it feels unsettling.

1000622560.english: Judging by the communication sensitivity and your intuition, there certainly seems to be something there.
1000622560.korean: 통신 감도도 그렇고, 당신의 감이라면 확실히 뭔가 있기는 한가보군요.

1000622561.english: It might be related to that robot from a moment ago.
1000622561.korean: 조금전의 그 로봇과 관계가 있을지도 모르겠습니다.

1000622563.english: Still, the pursuit is suspended for the time being. Contacting the Master comes first.
1000622563.korean: 그래도 추격은 잠시 중지입니다. 주인님에게 연락하는 것이 먼저에요.

1000622564.english: First, let's look for a place nearby where we can get a good signal.
1000622564.korean: 일단 주변에서 신호가 잘 잡힐만한 곳을 찾아보죠.

1000622566.english: This place should be decent. I will try reconnecting.
1000622566.korean: 이곳이면 좀 괜찮겠군요. 다시 통신을 연결해보겠습니다.

1000622570.english: Let's go back to the master for now.

1000622571.english: It would be best to report it and properly organize an investigation team.
1000622571.korean: 보고를 드리고 제대로 조사대를 편성하는게 좋겠어요.

1000622574.english: It seems like you are very familiar with the terrain here.
1000622574.korean: 이곳의 지형에 굉장히 익숙한 것 같아요.

1000622575.english: It looks quite worn out, too...

1000622576.english: If I get caught, I’ll tie you up tight and throw you to Gremlin Miss as her plaything...!
1000622576.korean: 잡히면 그대로 꽁꽁 묶어서 그렘린 양의 노리개로 던져주고 말겠습니다...!

1000622577.english: Phew, that was a close call.

1000622578.english: It might be different if it were Lady Geum-ran, but the Vanilla model is too scary.
1000622578.korean: 금란 아씨라면 모를까, 바닐라 모델은 너무 무섭-

1000622589.english: How kind. To use a scabbard.

1000622590.english: I thought it would be too late if I drew my sword.

1000622591.english: Haha, as expected of Lady Geum-ran! A sword strike as light as a beam, so sharp the opponent doesn't even realize they've been cut!
1000622591.korean: 하하, 역시 금란 아씨로군요! 상대가 베인줄도 모른다는 빛살같은 검격!

1000622592.english: I never dreamed I would take that sword strike— *Screaming*.
1000622592.korean: 제가 그 검격을 받아 볼 줄은 꿈에도 몰랐- 쿠엑.

1000622594.english: Shut your mouth and stay out of it.

1000622596.english: If you hit me like that, won't your hand reach me...! To think a piece of flesh touched my beautiful metal frame!
1000622596.korean: 그렇게 때리시면 손이 닿지 않습니까...! 제 아름다운 금속 프레임에 살덩이가 닿다니!

1000622600.english: I will ask you first. What on earth are you?
1000622600.korean: 일단 물어는 보겠습니다. 당신은 도대체 뭡니까?

1000622602.english: My apologies for the late introduction. My name is Alfred. Please call me Mr. Alfred!
1000622602.korean: 소개가 늦었습니다. 제 이름은 알프레드. Mr 알프레드라고 불러주시지요!

1000622603.english: I'm not interested in that kind of thing.

1000622604.english: I asked, "What on earth. Are. You. A. Robot?"

1000622605.english: Ugh, as expected of a vanilla model...!

1000622606.english: I was planning to tell you to make sure to add Mr. before Alfred if you call me that, but as expected, it’s not that easy...!
1000622606.korean: 알프레드라고 부르시면 앞에 반드시 Mr.를 붙여달라고 말씀드릴 생각이었는데, 역시 녹록치 않군요...!

1000622608.english: Hey, wait! If you're going to step on it, please do it somewhere other than the core...! It's sensitive there!
1000622608.korean: 자, 잠깐! 밟으시려면 코어말고 다른 곳으로 부탁드립니다...! 거긴 예민하니까요!

1000622611.english: ...Understood. If I interrogate you any further, I will lose my mind.
1000622611.korean: ...알겠습니다. 저는 이것을 더 심문하다간 돌아버리고 말겁니다.

1000622614.english: Um, you said your name was Alfred... right?

1000622615.english: Please call me Mr. Alfred, Miss Geum-ran!

1000622616.english: M-Mr. Alfred. We are members of the resistance fighting against the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs).
1000622616.korean: 미, 미스터 알프레드. 저희는 철충과 싸우는 저항군의 일원입니다.

1000622617.english: I recently arrived at the port in the west and am securing the island.
1000622617.korean: 얼마전 서쪽의 항구에 도착해 섬을 확보하고 있습니다.

1000622618.english: By any chance, what are you doing on this island?

1000622619.english: Kuhuhu, I'm sorry, but I can't tell you that.
1000622619.korean: 쿠후후, 죄송합니다만 그건 말씀드릴 수 없습니다.

1000622621.english: Now, wait! Please wait just a moment!

1000622622.english: It meant that I couldn't tell you "for free."

1000622623.english: Are you saying you expect something in return?

1000622624.english: That's exactly right! I'm kind of... right.

1000622625.english: You could call me a merchant. Receiving payment and handing over goods worthy of it!
1000622625.korean: 상인이라고 할 수 있습니다. 대가를 받고, 그에 합당한 물건을 넘겨드리는!

1000622626.english: Ha. Why don't you think about your own situation?

1000622627.english: Seeing you so nonchalant while being held captive and tied up tight...
1000622627.korean: 붙잡혀서 꽁꽁 묶여있는 주제에 그런 여유를...

1000622628.english: Kuhuhu... But don't you still need the information?

1000622630.english: I have become a prisoner of war due to an unfortunate accident, but I swear on this fedora that I had no intention of harming any of you.
1000622630.korean: 불행한 사고로 이렇게 포로가 되고 말았습니다만, 이 중절모에 맹세코 여러분에게 해를 끼칠 생각은 없었습니다.

1000622631.english: Believe it or not, I have lived on this island for decades. I can confidently say that nothing living or moving here is older than me.
1000622631.korean: 이래봬도 저는 이 섬에서 수십 년을 살아왔습니다. 이곳에서 살아 움직이는 것들 중에 저보다 오래된 건 없다고 단언할 수 있지요.

1000622632.english: Didn't you say you were securing an island? If so, I think it will definitely be helpful to you all.
1000622632.korean: 섬을 확보한다고 하셨지 않습니까? 그렇다면 저는 여러분에게 분명히 도움이 될 거라고 생각합니다만?

1000622634.english: Now, tell me what you want in return.
1000622634.korean: 어디, 대가로 무엇을 원하는지 말이나 한 번 해보시죠.

1000622635.english: It is nothing special. It is something you can pay right now.
1000622635.korean: 대단한 것은 아닙니다. 여러분께서 지금 바로 지불하실 수 있는것입니다.

1000622637.english: You wouldn't be asking us to hand over our weapons, would you?

1000622638.english: That is impossible! This island is fraught with dangers besides the Iron Bug. We cannot take away the weapons the ladies need to defend themselves!
1000622638.korean: 그럴리가요! 이 섬엔 철충들 외에도 위험이 산적해있습니다. 숙녀분들이 자신을 지킬 무기를 빼앗을 수는 없지요!

1000622639.english: Then what is it? I don't have a can of tuna right now.
1000622639.korean: 그럼 뭔가요? 참치캔은 지금 가지고 있지 않습니다.

1000622642.english: That's right! If you pull out just one strand of your hair!
1000622642.korean: 그렇습니다! 여러분의 머리카락을 한 가닥만 뽑아주신다면!

1000622643.english: I promise to help you until all the synovial fluid in your joints has dried up!
1000622643.korean: 관절의 윤활액이 다 날아갈 때까지! 여러분을 돕겠다고 약속드리겠습니다!

1000622644.english: Hair... what do you plan to use it for?

1000622646.english: I'm not sure why, but I'm very interested in the DNA of living organisms.
1000622646.korean: 어째서인지는 잘 모르겠지만, 저는 생명체의 DNA에 관심이 많습니다.

1000622647.english: There are countless living beings in this world, but the ones with the most beautiful DNA are none other than you, the Bioroids!
1000622647.korean: 이 세상에는 많고 많은 생명체가 있지만, 그중에서도 가장 아름다운 DNA를 가진 것은 바로! 여러분 바이오로이드 분들이지요!

1000622648.english: That beautiful structure, combining a natural arrangement with artificial processing! A fantastic double helix!
1000622648.korean: 자연스러운 배열에 인공적인 가공이 가미된 그 아름다운 구조! 환상적인 이중 나선!

1000622650.english: ...Didn't you say something about the flesh just a moment ago?

1000622651.english: Ugh, do you all know how heartbroken I am?!
1000622651.korean: 크으윽, 여러분께서 제 비통스러운 심정을 아십니까?!

1000622652.english: Even though I was captivated by that beauty! Even though I was so curious!

1000622653.english: I absolutely cannot endure direct contact with living creatures!
1000622653.korean: 생명체와 직접 접촉하는 것은 도저히 버틸 수가 없단 말입니다!

1000622654.english: Even when researching hair and the roots attached to it— Eek! Don't come near me!
1000622654.korean: 머리카락과 거기에 붙은 모근으로 연구할때도- 히익! 가까이 오지 마시지요!

1000622656.english: Rather than unique, he seems a bit frivolous...
1000622656.korean: 특이하다기보단 조금 경박... 하신 것 같은...

1000622657.english: beat around the bush too much. It is a truly disgusting robot.
1000622657.korean: 제가 너무 돌려서 말했군요. 정말 역겨운 로봇입니다.

1000622658.english: Kuhuhu, I won't be intimidated by such harsh words.
1000622658.korean: 쿠후후, 그정도의 심한 말로 저는 굴하지 않습니다.

1000622659.english: How about it, everyone? Won't you give me a single strand of hair?
1000622659.korean: 어떻습니까, 여러분. 저를 위해 머리카락 한 가닥을 주지 않으시겠습니까?

1000622660.english: Well, it’s really unpleasant, but if I can get information from a single strand of hair, I have nothing to lose.
1000622660.korean: 뭐, 영 기분나쁘긴 하지만 머리카락 한 가닥에 정보를 얻는다면 손해볼 건 없겠죠.

1000622664.english: If you spout nonsense again, this time I will shoot you with a gun instead of the hands and feet you hate.
1000622664.korean: 또 헛소리를 하면 이번엔 당신이 싫어하는 손과 발 대신 총을 쏴드리겠습니다.

1000622665.english: Ah, of course, that is not the case.

1000622666.english: I was so excited a moment ago that I forgot to mention this, but these are the initial terms of the transaction.
1000622666.korean: 조금 전엔 제가 너무 신이 나서 말씀드리는 걸 깜빡했는데, 이건 초기 거래 조건입니다.

1000622669.english: Kuhuhu, if you want more information and help, you can bring your comrades' hair too!
1000622669.korean: 쿠후후, 더욱 많은 정보와 도움을 원하시면 여러분의 동료들 머리카락도 가져오시는 겁니다!

1000622670.english: Bringing in cut hair is invalid! You must pluck the hair so that the root is included!
1000622670.korean: 잘라서 가져오시는 것은 무효! 반드시 모근이 포함되도록 뽑아서 가져오셔야 합니다!

1000622671.english: Ah, but if there are too many hair follicles attached, I won't be able to handle it, so you need to pay attention to it.
1000622671.korean: 아, 그래도 모근이 너무 많이 붙어있으면 제가 못버티니 신경 써주셔야 합니다.

1000622672.english: Then please go quickly and bring me the genes to satisfy my pleasure! I will wait here patiently!
1000622672.korean: 그러면 어서 가서 제 즐거움을 채워줄 유전자들을 가져와주시지요! 저는 이곳에서 얌전히 기다리고 있겠습니다!

1000622673.english: ...Huh? Why are you raising the gun?

1000622674.english: Uh, Miss KeumRan. Please stop your older sister!
1000622674.korean: 그, 금란 아씨. 언니분을 좀 말려주어어엇?!

1000622675.english: Oh... oh... Ka, that sword looks really sharp. It looks like it could cut someone like me in two in an instant.
1000622675.korean: 오... 오호... 카, 칼이 정말 예리해보이는군요. 저같은 건 단숨에 두동강 낼 수 있겠습니다.

1000622678.english: There are still quite a few Iron Bugs left.

1000622679.english: There are also things that have come deep in...
